en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Costa Rican Social Security documentation in the Costa Rica Social Security CCSS Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Costa Rica Social Security CCSS Certificate of Affiliation

Costa Rica’s Caja Costarricense de Seguro Social (CCSS) mandates that all companies with employees must register and comply with social security requirements, which include providing insurance and paying contributions for their workforce.\nThe Certificate of Affiliation proves that the company maintains active registration with CCSS and can be obtained directly from the CCSS through the official online portal, the Oficina Virtual, or by visiting authorized CCSS offices in person.
Please upload your company’s valid Certificate of Affiliation to verify compliance with Costa Rica’s Social Security requirements.
